name: Deferred - Old Wound - 2
description: Second returns for old wounds and lingering hurts.

results.description: [body] The old wound from {origin} marked you plainly enough that others could read it before you spoke.
results.name: old-wound-2

results.description: [stat Stamina -1] The hurt from {origin} finally cost you a measure of endurance you had long assumed was still yours.
results.name: old-wound-2

results.description: [body] What began in {origin} as a survivable injury became a lasting sign upon your body.
results.name: old-wound-2

results.description: [stat Dexterity -1] The old wound from {origin} narrowed what your hands or feet could once do without thought.
results.name: old-wound-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] You learned to live around the wound from {origin} so well that others mistook adaptation for strength.
results.name: old-wound-2

results.description: [body] The old injury from {origin} reopened just enough to leave a truer scar than the first one had.
results.name: old-wound-2

results.description: [stat Stamina -1] Your body finally insisted that {origin} had cost it more than pride had allowed you to admit.
results.name: old-wound-2

results.description: [body] The wound from {origin} settled into a permanent reminder rather than an active enemy.
results.name: old-wound-2

results.description: [stat Dexterity -1] The old hurt from {origin} made one movement, craft, or defense less trustworthy thereafter.
results.name: old-wound-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp] You came to know the limits imposed by {origin} well enough that they ceased to surprise, though never to please.
results.name: old-wound-2

results.description: [body] What your body suffered in {origin} became part of the story others told on seeing you bare or battered.
results.name: old-wound-2

results.description: [stat Stamina -1] The old wound from {origin} took its payment in fatigue, and there was no arguing with the account.
results.name: old-wound-2

results.description: [body] The injury from {origin} no longer threatened your life, only the illusion that your body still belonged wholly to you.
results.name: old-wound-2

results.description: [stat Dexterity -1] A wound from {origin} made swiftness or certainty desert you at the wrong time one time too many.
results.name: old-wound-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] You mastered the burden from {origin} well enough that its cost became hard for others to notice.
results.name: old-wound-2

results.description: [body] The old wound from {origin} became part of how the world recognized you, which is another way of saying it never fully left.
results.name: old-wound-2
